payload.title: Mistral launches OCR 4 targeting enterprise AI document extraction
payload.summary: Mistral introduced OCR 4, a product designed to enhance document extraction capabilities for enterprise AI applications, addressing growing demand for automation in business workflows.

payload.title: Mistral establishes Canadian hub in Montréal
payload.summary: Mistral selected Montréal as the location for its Canadian hub to leverage local AI talent and strengthen its regional innovation ecosystem.
